source.scope_zh: 内部洞察材料中的市场、客户、工况与实机评价内容；涉及历史机型和计划日期的结论均需按当前车型复核。
source.scope_en: Market, customer, work-condition, and field-evaluation evidence from the internal insight deck. Findings tied to legacy models or historical target dates require confirmation against current machines.

decisions.title_zh: 需求承压，竞争重心转向存量替代
decisions.title_en: Demand pressure shifts competition toward replacement sales
decisions.body_zh: 内部材料判断住房、利率与渠道库存变化会压制短期需求。材料中的 2025 年约 9 万台预测仅作为历史基线，当前判断应结合最新 EDA 与渠道数据更新。
decisions.body_en: The source deck links near-term demand pressure to housing, interest rates, and dealer inventory. Its approximately 90,000-unit 2025 forecast is retained only as a historical baseline and should be refreshed with current EDA and dealer data.

decisions.title_zh: 紧凑型主战区优先补齐产品力
decisions.title_en: Prioritize product competitiveness in the core compact range
decisions.body_zh: 源材料的产品线结构中，3-4 吨占 22.12%，5-6 吨占 14.22%，4-5 吨占 11.46%。该区间同时覆盖承包商、租赁、市政与园林客户。
decisions.body_en: In the source-deck portfolio structure, 3-4 t represents 22.12%, 5-6 t 14.22%, and 4-5 t 11.46%. These classes also serve contractors, rental fleets, municipal users, and landscapers.
decisions.source_zh: 依据：PPT 第 233 页；百分比为源材料结构口径
decisions.source_en: Evidence: deck slide 233; percentages follow the source-deck structure

decisions.title_zh: 按吨级分开选择产品标杆
decisions.title_en: Use different product benchmarks by tonnage class
decisions.body_zh: 0-10 吨重点参考 Kubota 的紧凑型谱系、运输适配和租赁覆盖；10 吨以上重点参考 CAT 的液压匹配、智能辅助和配置完整度。具体参数仍按各吨级数据表逐项核验。
decisions.body_en: For 0-10 t, use Kubota as a reference for compact portfolio coverage, transport fit, and rental readiness. Above 10 t, use CAT for hydraulic matching, operator-assist technology, and equipment completeness. Verify every specification in the class workbook.

excavator-1-2t.image_alt_zh: 1-2 吨级挖掘机使用轻型拖车运输
excavator-1-2t.image_alt_en: A 1-2 t excavator transported on a light-duty trailer

market.body_zh: 源材料将 1-2 吨列为微挖的重要入门区间，适用于入户、园林、小型承包与租赁。该比例为产品线结构口径，不等同于当前终端销量。
market.body_en: The source deck positions 1-2 t as an important entry mini-excavator class for residential access, landscaping, small contractors, and rental. The percentage is a portfolio-structure reference, not current retail volume.

customers.title_zh: 景观绿化、承包商和租赁为核心客户
customers.title_en: Landscapers, contractors, and rental fleets are the core customers
customers.body_zh: 源材料客户结构：景观绿化约 35%、小型承包商约 30%、设备租赁约 25%，公共部门与农场主各约 5%。
customers.body_en: Source-deck customer mix: approximately 35% landscaping, 30% small contractors, 25% rental, and about 5% each public-sector and agricultural users.

work.title_zh: 轻型皮卡加 6K 拖车，服务庭院和微型沟槽
work.title_en: Light-duty pickup plus 6K trailer for residential and micro-trenching work
work.body_zh: 客户重视整机加快换、拇指钳和常用铲斗后的组合重量，同时要求窄机身、低扰动、精细行走与属具快速切换。历史 XE18U 运输组合需映射到当前 XE19U 后复核。
work.body_en: Customers evaluate combined transport weight with coupler, thumb, and common buckets, together with narrow access, low ground disturbance, precise travel control, and fast attachment changes. The legacy XE18U transport case must be revalidated for the current XE19U.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 历史 XE18U 携常用铲斗的组合重量约 1,888 kg，满足源材料中的经济运输方案；当前 XE19U 需按实际附件组合重新称重。
field_evaluation.finding_en: The legacy XE18U example reached approximately 1,888 kg with common buckets and fit the source-deck transport concept. Reweigh the current XE19U with the actual attachment package.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 试机材料认为斗杆力、系统压力和行走牵引具有竞争力，适合松土、微沟槽和坡地转场。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Field notes identify competitive arm force, system pressure, and travel traction for ground engagement, micro-trenching, and grade transitions.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 行走脚踏死区、加速线性和复合动作仍是重点验证项，不能仅用纸面流量替代实机操控评价。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Travel-pedal dead band, acceleration linearity, and combined-function response remain priority validation items and cannot be inferred from paper flow ratings alone.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 历史材料记录驾驶室可选性与储物便利性不足；需以当前 XE19U 北美配置单重新确认。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Legacy notes flag cab availability and in-cab utility. Confirm these points against the current North American XE19U configuration sheet.

excavator-2-3t.image_alt_zh: 2-3 吨级短尾挖掘机拖车运输
excavator-2-3t.image_alt_en: A 2-3 t short-tail excavator on a trailer

market.body_zh: 该区间连接微挖与通用小挖，客户对运输经济性、短尾回转、沟槽覆盖和驾驶室全年适应性同时敏感。
market.body_en: This class bridges mini and general compact excavators. Customers simultaneously value economical transport, short-tail maneuverability, trench coverage, and all-season cab capability.

customers.title_zh: 景观、承包商和租赁客户占主导
customers.title_en: Landscaping, contractor, and rental customers dominate
customers.body_zh: 源材料沿用景观绿化约 35%、小型承包商约 30%、设备租赁约 25% 的客户结构，公共部门和农场客户构成补充。
customers.body_en: The source deck uses a customer mix of roughly 35% landscaping, 30% small contractors, and 25% rental, supplemented by public-sector and agricultural customers.

work.title_zh: 10K 拖车转场，聚焦狭窄沟槽和属具作业
work.title_en: 10K-trailer mobility for confined trenching and attachment work
work.body_zh: 真实使用强调皮卡拖运、短尾回转、低扰动行走、AUX 流量和驾驶室舒适性；运输结论必须按实际附件组合核算。
work.body_en: Real use emphasizes pickup-trailer mobility, short-tail rotation, low-disturbance travel, auxiliary flow, and cab comfort. Transport conclusions must use the actual attachment package.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 行走脚踏阀死区和加速线性不足，低速贴边和装卸拖车时需要专项标定验证。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Travel-pedal dead band and acceleration linearity require dedicated calibration validation for close-quarter work and trailer loading.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 源材料指出铲斗挖掘力、行走速度和机具系统流量相对标杆偏低。
field_evaluation.finding_en: The source deck identifies gaps in bucket breakout force, travel speed, and attachment-system flow versus the benchmark.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 7 英寸显示交互有优势，但驾驶室振动和空调制冷能力需要按当前配置复核。
field_evaluation.finding_en: The 7-inch display is a usability strength, while cab vibration and air-conditioning cooling performance require confirmation on the current specification.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 推土铲操作与高低速切换分离，影响频繁整平和转场工况下的操作效率。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Separate blade and travel-speed controls reduce operator efficiency during frequent grading and repositioning cycles.

excavator-35t.image_alt_zh: 3-4 吨级挖掘机使用轻型拖车转场
excavator-35t.image_alt_en: A 3-4 t excavator transported on a light-duty trailer

market.title_zh: 当前已建区间中的重点吨级
market.title_en: Highest-priority class within the current asset coverage
market.body_zh: 源材料中 3-4 吨结构占比最高，是承包商、租赁和市政用户交叉最明显的区间，应优先解决运输、效率和配置完整度问题。
market.body_en: The source deck assigns the largest structure share to 3-4 t. It strongly overlaps contractor, rental, and municipal demand, making transport, productivity, and equipment completeness priority issues.

customers.title_zh: 中小承包商与租赁构成主需求
customers.title_en: Small and mid-size contractors plus rental form the core demand
customers.body_zh: 源材料列示中小型承包商约 40%、租赁商约 30%、市政及公共事业约 15%，农业为补充。
customers.body_en: The source deck lists approximately 40% small and mid-size contractors, 30% rental, and 15% municipal/public-utility customers, with agriculture as a secondary segment.

work.title_zh: 14K 拖车边界下兼顾沟槽、回填和破碎
work.title_en: Trenching, backfilling, and breaker work within a 14K-trailer constraint
work.body_zh: 客户通常携带快换、拇指钳、挖沟斗和清理斗。附件后组合重量决定运输灵活性，四向/浮动推土铲和 AUX1 流量决定现场效率。
work.body_en: Customers commonly carry a coupler, thumb, trenching bucket, and grading bucket. Combined weight governs transport flexibility, while a 4-way/float blade and AUX1 flow govern jobsite productivity.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 整机加常用附件后接近或超过 4.5 吨运输边界，减重和附件包组合需要按目标拖车重新核算。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Machine-plus-attachment weight approaches or exceeds the 4.5 t transport boundary. Recalculate mass reduction and attachment-package choices against the target trailer.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 缺少四向和浮动推土铲，且控制集成度不足，直接影响沟槽回填和精平效率。
field_evaluation.finding_en: The absence of a 4-way/float blade and limited control integration directly reduce trench backfilling and finish-grading efficiency.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 铲斗挖掘力、行走速度、AUX1 流量和循环效率均被列为改进项，需要通过标准循环测试验证优先级。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Bucket force, travel speed, AUX1 flow, and cycle productivity are all listed as improvement items and should be prioritized through a standardized cycle test.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 显示屏、座椅到脚踏空间、扶手箱内宽和侧门锁位置对大体型用户不够友好。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Display size, seat-to-pedal clearance, console width, and side-door latch position are less suitable for larger operators.

excavator-4-5t.image_alt_zh: 4-5 吨级挖掘机使用轻型拖车转场
excavator-4-5t.image_alt_en: A 4-5 t excavator transported on a light-duty trailer

market.body_zh: 该区间向上承接更高稳定性和挖掘能力，向下仍受轻型拖车运输约束，产品定义必须在能力与组合重量之间平衡。
market.body_en: This class adds stability and digging capability while remaining constrained by light-trailer transport, so product definition must balance work capacity against combined transport weight.

customers.title_zh: 承包商、租赁和公共工程形成主要需求
customers.title_en: Contractors, rental, and public works form the main demand
customers.body_zh: 源材料客户结构约为承包商 40%、租赁 30%、市政及公共事业 20%、农业 10%。
customers.body_en: The source deck estimates roughly 40% contractors, 30% rental, 20% municipal/public-utility, and 10% agricultural customers.

work.title_zh: 通用施工与租赁场景，运输重量决定装载组合
work.title_en: General construction and rental use, with transport weight governing attachment choice
work.body_zh: 典型组合包括副配重、快换、拇指钳、挖沟斗和清理斗；整机稳定性、直线行走和回转制动会直接影响装车与短循环作业。
work.body_en: Typical packages include counterweight, coupler, thumb, trenching bucket, and grading bucket. Stability, straight-line travel, and swing braking directly affect truck loading and short-cycle work.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 源材料认为整机稳定性较强，工作范围接近主要参考产品，是重载附件应用的基础优势。
field_evaluation.finding_en: The source deck identifies strong machine stability and a working range close to key references, supporting heavier attachment applications.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 常用附件组合后重量超过 5.2 吨，轻型拖车灵活性下降；需明确减重与结构强度之间的工程边界。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Combined weight exceeds 5.2 t with common attachments, reducing light-trailer flexibility. Engineering must define the allowable trade-off between mass reduction and structural durability.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 回转制动冲击和高速直线行走偏差会影响装车循环与坡地转场的可控性。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Swing-brake shock and high-speed straight-travel deviation reduce controllability in loading cycles and grade transitions.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 侧门定位锁从座椅位置操作不便，属于低成本但高频的人机工程改进项。
field_evaluation.finding_en: The side-door latch is difficult to operate from the seat, making it a low-cost, high-frequency ergonomics opportunity.

excavator-5-6t.image_alt_en: A 5-6 t excavator loading onto a trailer

market.title_zh: 通用小挖的重要规模区间
market.body_zh: 5-6 吨在源材料产品线结构中占 14.22%，兼顾运输、稳定、土方和属具能力，是租赁与承包商覆盖面较宽的区间。
market.body_en: The 5-6 t class represents 14.22% in the source-deck portfolio structure and balances transport, stability, earthmoving, and attachment capability across broad rental and contractor use.

customers.title_zh: 承包商与租赁占七成需求
customers.title_en: Contractors and rental account for about seventy percent of demand
customers.body_zh: 源材料客户结构约为承包商 40%、租赁 30%、市政及公共事业 20%、农业 10%。
customers.body_en: The source deck estimates roughly 40% contractors, 30% rental, 20% municipal/public-utility, and 10% agricultural customers.

work.title_zh: 16K 拖车覆盖通用土方、沟槽和液压属具
work.title_en: 16K-trailer mobility for general earthmoving, trenching, and hydraulic attachments
work.body_zh: 用户同时关注装车效率、稳定性、牵引、快换属具和驾驶安全；推土铲与高低速控制集成对频繁整平转场尤为重要。
work.body_en: Users simultaneously value loading productivity, stability, traction, quick attachment changes, and operator safety. Integrated blade and travel-speed controls are particularly important in repeated grading and repositioning cycles.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 试机材料认为稳定性和起吊能力较强，适合带较重属具和辅助吊装工况。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Field notes identify strong stability and lifting capability for heavier attachments and secondary lifting work.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 发动机功率、行走速度和牵引力被列为相对竞品的主要短板，需要联合泵、马达和标定验证。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Engine power, travel speed, and traction are listed as key gaps and require joint validation of pump, motor, and calibration choices.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 附件流量和双辅助管路具备优势，但铲斗挖掘力仍需对标久保田进行实测。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Attachment flow and dual auxiliary circuits are strengths, while bucket breakout force still requires physical comparison against Kubota.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 推土铲控制、报警消音、后视摄像头、侧门锁和手机支架构成一组高频客户体验差距。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Blade controls, alarm mute, rear camera, side-door latch, and phone storage form a cluster of frequent customer-experience gaps.

excavator-7-8t.image_source_zh: XCMG USA 官方产品素材；源PPT未提供该吨级独立实景图
excavator-7-8t.image_source_en: Official XCMG USA product asset; the source deck does not provide a dedicated field image for this exact class

market.title_zh: 6-8 吨邻近区间结构占比参考
market.body_zh: 源材料以 6-8 吨区间统计 4.84%，与本页 7-8 吨范围并非完全一致，只用于判断产品线位置，不用于精确估算当前销量。
market.body_en: The source deck reports 4.84% for the broader 6-8 t range, which does not exactly match this 7-8 t asset. Use it only for portfolio positioning, not precise current-volume estimation.

customers.title_zh: 中小承包商、租赁与市政用户
customers.title_en: Small and mid-size contractors, rental fleets, and municipal users
customers.body_zh: 该吨级承担从通用小挖向中型施工的过渡，客户更看重沟槽覆盖、吊装稳定、属具管路耐久和转场效率。
customers.body_en: This class bridges compact and mid-size work. Customers place greater emphasis on trench reach, lifting stability, attachment-line durability, and jobsite mobility.
customers.source_zh: PPT 第 233、238 页的产品定位与问题项
customers.source_en: Product positioning and issue statements on deck slides 233 and 238

work.title_zh: 公用工程沟槽、场地整理和中等负载属具
work.title_en: Utility trenching, site preparation, and medium-duty attachments
work.body_zh: 深挖时斗杆长度和属具管路外廓直接影响覆盖与耐久；推土铲手柄位置和操作空间决定高频整平效率。
work.body_en: During deep trenching, arm length and attachment-line envelope directly affect reach and durability. Blade-control location and clearance govern repetitive grading productivity.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 源材料认为标配斗杆偏短，深沟和远端清底覆盖不足；提出 2,100 mm 斗杆方案，但当前状态需重新确认。
field_evaluation.finding_en: The source deck identifies insufficient arm length for deep trenching and far-side cleanup. A 2,100 mm arm was proposed, but current implementation status requires confirmation.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 手柄操作空间不足且布置习惯与客户不一致，会增加频繁整平工况下的操作负担。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Limited control clearance and a layout inconsistent with customer habits increase operator workload in repetitive grading work.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 深挖时斗杆机具管路可能碰壁，建议将管路外廓控制在快换宽度以内并进行极限姿态干涉验证。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Attachment lines may contact trench walls during deep digging. Keep the line envelope within coupler width and validate interference at extreme positions.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 源材料记录国四升级样机和量产计划，但计划节点已经过去，不能直接视为已完成。
field_evaluation.finding_en: The source deck records prototype and production targets for an upgraded machine, but elapsed target dates do not prove completion.

excavator-8-10t.image_alt_zh: 8-10 吨级挖掘机使用重型皮卡和拖车运输
excavator-8-10t.image_alt_en: An 8-10 t excavator transported by heavy-duty pickup and trailer

market.title_zh: 8-12 吨邻近区间结构占比参考
market.body_zh: 源材料将 8-12 吨合并为 7.65%，并指出 CAT 通过 308/309 高低搭配强化覆盖。该范围比本页更宽，应作为市场位置参考。
market.body_en: The source deck combines 8-12 t at 7.65% and notes CAT's two-model 308/309 coverage strategy. Because that range is broader than this page, use it as a market-position reference.

customers.title_zh: 承包商和租赁仍占主体，公共工程与能源客户增加
customers.title_en: Contractors and rental remain primary, with more public-works and energy users
customers.body_zh: 源材料客户结构约为承包商 40%、租赁 30%、市政及公共事业 15%、景观建设 10%、能源与油气承包商 5%。
customers.body_en: The source deck estimates approximately 40% contractors, 30% rental, 15% municipal/public-utility, 10% landscape construction, and 5% energy/oil-and-gas contractors.

work.title_zh: 重型皮卡加 30K 拖车，面向土方、沟槽和属具循环
work.title_en: Heavy-duty pickup plus 30K trailer for earthmoving, trenching, and attachment cycles
work.body_zh: 整机、快换、拇指钳和多铲斗组合约束运输重量；运输高度、双动臂稳定、牵引、起吊与清洁保养共同决定北美适用性。
work.body_en: Transport is constrained by the machine plus coupler, thumb, and multiple buckets. Transport height, two-piece-boom stability, traction, lifting, and service access jointly determine North American application fit.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 源材料认为发动机功率、主泵流量、系统压力和 AUX1 流量具有比较优势。
field_evaluation.finding_en: The source deck identifies comparative strengths in engine power, main-pump flow, system pressure, and AUX1 flow.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 运输高度和整机重量偏高，双动臂工况稳定性不足；高度应以不超过 2,590 mm 的目标进行样机复核。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Transport height and machine weight are high, and two-piece-boom stability is insufficient. Validate the prototype against a transport-height target of no more than 2,590 mm.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 铲斗挖掘力、行走牵引和部分起吊能力低于参考，需要区分结构、液压和配重的贡献。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Bucket force, travel traction, and selected lifting conditions trail the references. Separate structural, hydraulic, and counterweight contributions during validation.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 基础可靠性和维护便利性接近竞品，但涂层防锈、橡胶件耐久和管路标识仍有改善空间。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Baseline reliability and serviceability are comparable, while coating corrosion resistance, rubber durability, and line identification remain improvement areas.

excavator-12-14t.image_alt_zh: 12-14 吨级挖掘机使用阶梯式拖车运输
excavator-12-14t.image_alt_en: A 12-14 t excavator transported on a step-deck trailer

market.title_zh: 12-14 吨级为小规模专业区间
market.title_en: 12-14 t is a smaller specialist class
market.body_zh: 源材料认为该区间销量较低且承压，竞争集中在 CAT、Deere、SANY 和 Komatsu。产品定义应聚焦明确工况，而非追求宽泛覆盖。
market.body_en: The source deck describes this class as lower-volume and under pressure, with competition concentrated among CAT, Deere, SANY, and Komatsu. Product definition should target specific applications rather than broad coverage.

customers.title_zh: 建筑承包、市政、公用事业和能源客户
customers.title_en: Construction, municipal, utility, and energy customers
customers.body_zh: 源材料列出建筑承包、市政公共事业、能源、景观建设与租赁等客户，但原页比例合计存在口径异常，本页只保留客户类型。
customers.body_en: The source deck lists construction, municipal/public-utility, energy, landscape, and rental customers. Because the original percentages do not reconcile, this page retains only the customer categories.
customers.source_zh: PPT 第 132 页；比例待核验

work.title_zh: 阶梯式拖车转场，服务基础、道路和公用工程
work.title_en: Step-deck transport for foundation, roadway, and utility work
work.body_zh: 核心边界包括 2,590 mm 运输宽度、整车高度和轴荷；现场则看深挖范围、重载挖掘、起吊、复合动作和长斗杆扩展。
work.body_en: Key transport constraints include 2,590 mm width, overall transport height, and axle loading. Jobsite priorities are digging depth, heavy digging, lifting, combined functions, and long-arm availability.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 源材料认为挖掘力和牵引具有优势，可支撑基础开挖与重载土方。
field_evaluation.finding_en: The source deck identifies strong digging force and traction for foundation excavation and heavy earthmoving.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 缺少长斗杆扩展会限制深沟和远端清底，需要建立标配与长斗杆两套工作范围及稳定性验证。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Limited long-arm availability constrains deep trenching and far-side cleanup. Validate working range and stability for both standard and long-arm configurations.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 行走加上车动作的复合协调仍落后于全电控或三泵方案，需要以坡地转场和装车循环实测。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Travel-plus-upperstructure coordination trails full-electrohydraulic or three-pump solutions and should be tested in grade transitions and loading cycles.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 部分起吊工况和 2D/3D、电子围栏等辅助配置需对标 CAT 的应用完整度。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Selected lifting conditions and assist features such as 2D/3D guidance and e-fence should be benchmarked against CAT's application completeness.

excavator-14-16t-short-tail.image_alt_zh: 14-16 吨级短尾挖掘机进行土方施工
excavator-14-16t-short-tail.image_alt_en: A 14-16 t short-tail excavator performing earthmoving work

market.title_zh: 短尾是 14-16 吨级的核心差异化
market.title_en: Short-tail geometry is the core differentiator in the 14-16 t class
market.body_zh: 源材料将该区间定位为城市道路、住宅与公共基础设施的热门短尾市场，CAT、Deere 与 Komatsu 形成主要竞争。
market.body_en: The source deck positions this class as a popular short-tail market for urban roads, residential construction, and public infrastructure, led by CAT, Deere, and Komatsu.

customers.title_zh: 受限城市施工客户重视短尾与辅助功能
customers.title_en: Confined urban users value short-tail geometry and assist features
customers.body_zh: 建筑承包、市政、公用事业、能源、景观和租赁客户共同构成需求，原材料比例存在口径异常，因此不展示未经核验的占比。
customers.body_en: Construction, municipal, utility, energy, landscape, and rental customers all contribute to demand. The source percentages do not reconcile, so unvalidated shares are not shown.
customers.source_zh: PPT 第 132-133 页；比例待核验

work.title_zh: 城市道路、住宅和基础施工中的受限回转作业
work.title_en: Confined-swing work in urban roads, residential sites, and foundations
work.body_zh: 短尾降低尾部侵入，但客户仍要求长斗杆覆盖、平顺回转、行走复合、360°视野和可直接使用的 2D/3D 辅助。
work.body_en: Short-tail geometry reduces rear intrusion, but customers still expect long-arm reach, smooth swing, coordinated travel, 360-degree visibility, and production-ready 2D/3D assistance.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 短尾结构匹配城市道路和住宅场地，但必须与驾驶室空间、管路外廓和整机稳定共同评价。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Short-tail geometry suits urban roads and residential sites, but must be evaluated together with cab space, line envelope, and machine stability.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 标配斗杆偏短且源材料认为泵流量不足，会限制深挖覆盖和复合动作效率。
field_evaluation.finding_en: The standard arm is short and the source deck identifies insufficient pump flow, limiting deep-dig reach and combined-function productivity.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 回转制动和脚阀线性不足，在受限空间会放大冲击与定位误差。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Insufficient swing-brake and travel-pedal linearity magnify shock and positioning error in confined work.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 缺少成熟的 2D/3D 辅助与 360°全景影像，和 CAT 的智能辅助完整度存在差距。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Production-ready 2D/3D assistance and 360-degree imaging are missing, leaving a gap to CAT's assist-feature completeness.

excavator-21-24t.image_alt_zh: 21-24 吨级挖掘机使用阶梯式拖车运输
excavator-21-24t.image_alt_en: A 21-24 t excavator transported on a step-deck trailer

market.title_zh: 21-24 吨级是中大型通用核心区间
market.title_en: 21-24 t is a core general-purpose mid-size class
market.body_zh: 源材料认为 20 吨级应用广、竞争集中，既服务建筑土方，也覆盖道路、市政、能源和租赁，是产品线向中大型延伸的关键节点。
market.body_en: The source deck describes the 20 t class as broad-use and highly competitive across construction earthmoving, roadwork, municipal, energy, and rental applications, making it a key mid-size portfolio anchor.

customers.title_zh: 建筑开发商、能源、市政与租赁客户
customers.title_en: Construction developers, energy, municipal, and rental customers
customers.body_zh: 源材料列出建筑与房地产开发、能源与油气、市政工程、景观建设和租赁等客户；原页比例合计异常，本页不引用未经核验的占比。
customers.body_en: The source deck lists construction and real-estate development, energy/oil-and-gas, municipal works, landscape construction, and rental. Because the original shares do not reconcile, unvalidated percentages are omitted.
customers.source_zh: PPT 第 153 页；比例待核验

work.title_zh: 三轴阶梯式拖车转场，覆盖重载土方、深沟和破碎
work.title_en: Three-axle step-deck transport for heavy earthmoving, deep trenching, and breaker work
work.body_zh: 运输高度约束、长斗杆扩展、回转力矩、铲斗力、行走脚阀和智能辅助共同决定 20 吨级作业效率与客户接受度。
work.body_en: Transport-height constraints, long-arm availability, swing torque, bucket force, travel-pedal behavior, and assist technology jointly determine 20 t productivity and customer acceptance.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: AUX1、AUX2、泄油与流量合并等配置形成较完整的属具基础，适合破碎和多功能施工。
field_evaluation.finding_en: AUX1, AUX2, case drain, and flow-combining provisions provide a strong attachment foundation for breaker and multi-tool applications.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 缺少约 3,900 mm 长斗杆配置，深沟和远端清底覆盖受限。
field_evaluation.finding_en: The lack of an approximately 3,900 mm long-arm option limits deep trenching and far-side cleanup.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 回转制动线性、回转力矩和铲斗挖掘力均被列为效率差距，需要用标准装车循环与压力流量记录验证。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Swing-brake linearity, swing torque, and bucket force are identified as productivity gaps and require a standardized loading cycle with pressure and flow logging.

field_evaluation.finding_zh: 辅助挖掘、10 英寸英制仪表和脚阀线性是与新一代竞品拉开体验差距的主要项目。
field_evaluation.finding_en: Grade-assist capability, a 10-inch display with imperial units, and travel-pedal linearity are key experience gaps versus new-generation competitors.

segments.models: XE19U · XE27U PRO · XE35U PRO · XE55U PRO · XE75U PRO
segments.focus_zh: 运输经济性、短尾与受限空间、租赁配置、精细操控
segments.focus_en: Transport economy, short-tail and confined-site fit, rental equipment, and fine control

segments.focus_zh: 工作范围、重载效率、智能辅助、属具与驾驶环境
segments.focus_en: Working range, heavy-duty productivity, assist technology, attachments, and operator environment

roadmap.issue_zh: 行走速度与脚踏线性、报警消音、回转制动和驾驶室便利性
roadmap.issue_en: Travel speed and pedal linearity, alarm mute, swing braking, and cab utility
roadmap.action_zh: 验证 15.4 kW 动力、自动双速行走与脚踏标定；补齐报警消音和储物方案
roadmap.action_en: Validate 15.4 kW power, automatic two-speed travel, and pedal calibration; complete alarm-mute and storage solutions
roadmap.validation_zh: 实测高速 ≥4.2 km/h；记录脚踏死区、直线行走、坡道驻车与客户试用反馈
roadmap.validation_en: Measure high travel speed ≥4.2 km/h; log pedal dead band, straight travel, grade holding, and customer-trial feedback

roadmap.issue_zh: 行走微操、速度、驾驶室振动与制冷、铲斗力和机具流量
roadmap.issue_en: Travel fine control and speed, cab vibration and cooling, bucket force, and attachment flow
roadmap.action_zh: 新一代脚踏阀与动力液压升级；集成推土铲/高低速控制；优化四连杆与驾驶室
roadmap.action_en: Next-generation pedal, power, and hydraulic upgrades; integrate blade/travel-speed controls; optimize linkage and cab
roadmap.status_zh: 源材料标注部分完成，待复核
roadmap.status_en: Source marks partial completion; confirmation required
roadmap.validation_zh: 测试低速微动、驾驶室振动、空调降温、铲斗力和 AUX1 实际流量
roadmap.validation_en: Test low-speed modulation, cab vibration, cooling pull-down, bucket force, and measured AUX1 flow

roadmap.issue_zh: 附件后超重、缺少四向浮动铲、效率/流量/挖掘力、人机空间
roadmap.issue_en: Overweight attachment package, no 4-way float blade, productivity/flow/force gaps, and limited operator space
roadmap.action_zh: 下一代轻量化与大支重轮；开发四向浮动铲；提升行走、AUX1、四连杆和 7 英寸交互
roadmap.action_en: Next-generation mass reduction and larger rollers; develop 4-way float blade; improve travel, AUX1, linkage, and 7-inch HMI
roadmap.status_zh: 原计划节点已过，需更新验证
roadmap.status_en: Original target elapsed; update and validate
roadmap.validation_zh: 附件组合称重 <4.5 t 目标；回填循环、AUX1 流量、行走稳定和 95 百分位驾驶员包络
roadmap.validation_en: Target attachment-package mass <4.5 t; validate backfill cycle, AUX1 flow, travel stability, and 95th-percentile operator envelope

roadmap.issue_zh: 组合重量偏高、回转制动冲击、高速直线行走和侧门锁可达性
roadmap.issue_en: High combined weight, swing-brake shock, high-speed tracking, and side-door latch reach
roadmap.action_zh: 明确减重/强度边界；优化回转缓冲与卸油；校正直线行走；内置侧门解锁
roadmap.action_en: Define mass/durability boundary; optimize swing cushioning and drain path; correct straight travel; relocate door release inside
roadmap.status_zh: 原计划节点已过，需更新验证
roadmap.status_en: Original target elapsed; update and validate
roadmap.validation_zh: 称重、回转停止摆幅、50 m 直线偏差及座椅位置侧门操作测试
roadmap.validation_en: Verify mass, swing-stop oscillation, 50 m tracking deviation, and seated door-latch operation

roadmap.issue_zh: 动力/行走/牵引/铲斗力不足，控制与后视安全配置不完整
roadmap.issue_en: Power, travel, traction, and bucket-force gaps plus incomplete controls and rear-visibility equipment
roadmap.action_zh: 升级发动机、主泵和行走马达；集成推土铲控制；补独立加注、后视摄像头、报警消音和手机支架
roadmap.action_en: Upgrade engine, main pump, and travel motor; integrate blade controls; add independent fill, rear camera, alarm mute, and phone storage
roadmap.status_zh: 方案状态不一，需逐项确认
roadmap.status_en: Mixed action status; item-by-item confirmation required
roadmap.validation_zh: 牵引力、速度、铲斗力、循环油耗、摄像头视野与保养工时对比
roadmap.validation_en: Compare traction, speed, bucket force, cycle fuel use, camera coverage, and service time

roadmap.issue_zh: 斗杆短、推土铲手柄布置不佳、属具管路深挖干涉
roadmap.issue_en: Short arm, suboptimal blade-control layout, and attachment-line interference during deep digging
roadmap.action_zh: 验证 2,100 mm 斗杆；更新手柄位置；将管路外廓控制在快换宽度以内
roadmap.action_en: Validate a 2,100 mm arm; update control position; keep line envelope within coupler width
roadmap.status_zh: 原计划节点已过，需当前样机确认
roadmap.status_en: Original target elapsed; confirm on current prototype
roadmap.validation_zh: 工作范围、极限姿态干涉、管路磨损和连续整平人机工程测试
roadmap.validation_en: Validate working range, extreme-position interference, hose wear, and ergonomics in repetitive grading

roadmap.issue_zh: 运输高度/重量、控制集成、加注便利与双动臂稳定
roadmap.issue_en: Transport height/weight, control integration, fill access, and two-piece-boom stability
roadmap.action_zh: 降高至 ≤2,590 mm；集成高低速与铲控；验证独立加注口、导向轮/副配重与轻量化
roadmap.action_en: Reduce height to ≤2,590 mm; integrate travel-speed and blade controls; validate independent fill, idler/counterweight, and mass reduction
roadmap.status_zh: 存在样件记录，整机结果待验证
roadmap.status_en: Component samples recorded; full-machine result pending
roadmap.validation_zh: 运输包络、双动臂全工况稳定、接地比压、橡胶履带寿命与操作循环
roadmap.validation_en: Validate transport envelope, full-chart two-piece-boom stability, ground pressure, rubber-track durability, and control cycle

roadmap.issue_zh: 长斗杆、行走复合、部分起吊与智能辅助覆盖不足
roadmap.issue_en: Insufficient long-arm availability, travel coordination, selected lifting conditions, and assist-feature coverage
roadmap.action_zh: 建立长斗杆方案；评估电液控/三泵协调；补齐 2D/3D、电子围栏和载荷辅助
roadmap.action_en: Develop a long-arm package; evaluate electrohydraulic/three-pump coordination; add 2D/3D, e-fence, and load-assist capability
roadmap.validation_zh: 深沟覆盖、复合动作周期、全载荷表稳定性和辅助系统可用性测试
roadmap.validation_en: Validate deep-trench reach, combined-function cycle, full load-chart stability, and assist-system usability

roadmap.issue_zh: 管路外廓、斗杆长度、回转/脚阀线性、驾驶室与智能辅助
roadmap.issue_en: Line envelope, arm length, swing/pedal linearity, cab space, and assist technology
roadmap.action_zh: 紧凑管路、2.8 m 斗杆、回转缓冲与脚阀优化；升级驾驶室、360°影像和 10 英寸英制仪表
roadmap.action_en: Compact line routing, 2.8 m arm, swing cushioning, and pedal optimization; upgrade cab, 360° imaging, and 10-inch imperial HMI
roadmap.status_zh: 仪表源材料标注完成，其余待确认
roadmap.status_en: Display marked complete in source; remaining items require confirmation
roadmap.validation_zh: 深沟管路干涉、回转停止、行走冲击、驾驶员空间、影像盲区和辅助功能测试
roadmap.validation_en: Validate trench-wall line interference, swing stop, travel shock, operator space, camera blind zones, and assist functions

roadmap.issue_zh: 缺长斗杆，回转制动/力矩与铲斗力不足，智能辅助和人机交互滞后
roadmap.issue_en: No long arm; swing braking/torque and bucket force gaps; lagging assist technology and HMI
roadmap.action_zh: 开发 3,900 mm 斗杆；升级回转马达、四连杆与配重；补辅助挖掘、10 英寸英制仪表和脚阀标定
roadmap.action_en: Develop a 3,900 mm arm; upgrade swing motor, linkage, and counterweight; add digging assist, 10-inch imperial HMI, and pedal calibration
roadmap.status_zh: 原计划节点已过，需实机验证
roadmap.status_en: Original target elapsed; machine validation required
roadmap.validation_zh: 工作范围、装车循环、回转力矩、铲斗力、脚阀冲击和辅助系统场景测试
roadmap.validation_en: Validate working range, loading cycle, swing torque, bucket force, pedal shock, and assist-system scenarios
